questions.question: John says God's commands are not what?
questions.feedback: This is love for God: to keep his commands. And his commands are not burdensome.

questions.question: What is the victory that has overcome the world?
questions.feedback: This is the victory that has overcome the world — our faith.

questions.question: John writes so that believers may know they have eternal life.
questions.feedback: I write these things so that you may know you have eternal life.

questions.question: This is the testimony: God has given us eternal life, and this life is in his _____.
questions.feedback: God has given us eternal life, and this life is in his Son.

questions.question: Little children, keep yourselves from _____.
questions.feedback: Dear children, keep yourselves from idols.
